### Step 1: Orient in the codebase

NetBox is an extensible open-source network source-of-truth application that manages network infrastructure data. The codebase is organized into Django apps, each following a standard layout with models, views, APIs, forms, tables, and tests. The core device model lives in `/Users/luc/Developer/luuuc/oss/sense-benchmark/baseline/netbox/netbox/dcim/models/devices.py:498` and represents physical hardware mounted within a rack.
